text: "Hello." "Hello." "Hi. Good morning. This is Evelyn. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Alabama State Relief Program. So, have you been notified about these benefits yet?" "Eld you take the $300, but I don't want it." Sorry, but-
